Each level can inherit, customize, or create net-new configurations without affecting upstream definitions.\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│  SYSTEM (Global Defaults)                           │\n│  Owned by: Platform                                 │\n│  Scope: All tenants see these                       │\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤\n│  COMPANY (Organization Overrides)                   │\n│  Owned by: Organization (tenant)                    │\n│  Scope: All projects within the org                 │\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤\n│  PROJECT (Project-Specific)                         │\n│  Owned by: Project within an org                    │\n│  Scope: All units within the project                │\n├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤\n│  UNIT (Instance — Actual Work)                      │\n│  Owned by: Individual unit (apartment, suite, etc.) │\n│  Scope: Concrete work orders assigned here          │\n└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## Type Orders (Workspaces)\n\nType orders define **what spaces exist** — rooms, areas, zones — and how they compose into larger unit types.\n\n### Categories\n\nEvery type order belongs to one of four categories:\n\n| Category | Examples | Purpose |\n|----------|----------|---------|\n| `interior` | Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom, Closet | Rooms inside a unit |\n| `exterior` | Balcony, Patio, Parking Space | Outdoor or attached spaces |\n| `common` | Lobby, Common Hallway, Common Laundry | Shared building areas |\n| `pre_construction` | Demolition Zone, Staging Area | Temporary project phases |\n\n### Atomic vs. Composite\n\n- **Atomic** type orders are individual spaces (Kitchen, Bathroom, Bedroom)\n- **Composite** type orders are unit templates built from atomic components:\n\n```\nStudio  = Living Room(1) + Kitchen(1) + Bathroom(1)\n1BR     = Living Room(1) + Kitchen(1) + Bathroom(1) + Bedroom(1)\n2BR     = Living Room(1) + Kitchen(1) + Bathroom(1) + Bedroom(2)\n3BR     = Living Room(1) + Kitchen(1) + Bathroom(2) + Bedroom(3)\n```\n\nComposites are defined via `type_order_compositions` with quantity support, so a 3BR can specify \"3 bedrooms\" rather than listing each individually.\n\n### Flexibility by Level\n\n| Level | What You Can Do | Example |\n|-------|----------------|---------|\n| **System** | Define universal space types available to all tenants | Kitchen, Bathroom, Studio, 1BR |\n| **Company** | Add org-specific spaces, inherit and rename system types | \"Butler\\'s Pantry\" (custom interior), rename \"Entry\" → \"Vestibule\" |\n| **Project** | Add project-specific spaces, override company defaults | \"Penthouse Suite\" composite, \"Rooftop Terrace\" exterior |\n\n**Inheritance model:** Copy-on-inherit. When a company adopts a system type order, a company-scoped copy is created with `parent_type_order_id` pointing to the system original. Edits to the company copy do **not** propagate back to system, and future system changes do **not** auto-propagate to existing company copies.\n\n---\n\n## Trades\n\nTrades define **who does the work** — the trade disciplines involved in construction.\n\n| Level | Flexibility |\n|-------|------------|\n| **System** | 10 built-in trades (Painting, Carpentry, Plumbing, Flooring, Electrical, HVAC, Appliances, Window Coverings, Millwork, General) |\n| **Company** | Add custom trades specific to the org (e.g., \"Fire Protection\", \"Low Voltage\"). Linked via `organization_trades` junction. |\n\nTrades are **two-tier only** (system + company) because trade disciplines don't vary per project — they vary per organization.\n\nDenormalized `trade_name` fields on templates and work orders are kept in sync via database triggers, so queries can filter by trade without joins.\n\n---\n\n## Project Outcomes\n\nProject outcomes classify **what kind of project** this is, which determines which trades and templates are relevant.\n\n| Level | Flexibility |\n|-------|------------|\n| **System** | 4 built-in outcomes: Residential Renovation, Commercial Buildout, New Residential Construction, Maintenance & Repair |\n| **Company** | Add custom outcomes (e.g., \"Historic Restoration\", \"Tenant Improvement\") |\n\nEach outcome has **trade assignments** (`trade_outcome_assignments`) that define which trades are relevant:\n\n```\nResidential Renovation  → All 9 trades (excl. General)\nCommercial Buildout     → 7 trades (excl. Appliances, Window Coverings, General)\nMaintenance & Repair    → 5 trades (Plumbing, Electrical, HVAC, Appliances, General)\n```\n\nWhen a project selects an outcome, the UI can filter available templates and trades to only show what\\'s relevant.\n\n---\n\n## Work Order Templates\n\nTemplates define **what work gets done** — the task structure, measurements, and specifications for a scope of work.\n\n### Flexibility by Level\n\n| Level | What You Can Do | Inheritance |\n|-------|----------------|-------------|\n| **System** | Platform-provided best-practice templates (e.g., \"Painting - Standard\") | Root templates, no parent |\n| **Company** | Copy system templates and customize for org standards. Add entirely new templates. | `parent_template_id` → system template. `copied_from_template_id` tracks clone source. |\n| **Project** | Copy company templates and customize for project specifics. Add project-only templates. | `parent_template_id` → company template |\n| **Unit** | Work orders are **instances** of templates, assigned to specific units. Tasks within can be toggled \"not required\" via JSONB task data. | `template_id` → source template |\n\n### Copy-on-Inherit Model\n\n```\nSystem Template: \"Painting - Standard\"\n    │\n    ├── Company copies it → \"Painting - Standard\" (company scope)\n    │   │  Customizes: adds \"Crown Molding\" section\n    │   │\n    │   ├── Project copies it → \"Painting - Standard\" (project scope)\n    │   │   │  Customizes: removes \"Exterior\" section\n    │   │   │\n    │   │   └── Unit gets work order instance\n    │   │       Toggle: \"Ceiling\" task marked not-required\n    │   │\n    │   └── Different Project copies it → keeps Crown Molding, adds \"Accent Wall\"\n    │\n    └── System template updated later → does NOT affect any copies\n```\n\nKey properties:\n- **No auto-propagation**: Upstream edits never cascade to downstream copies\n- **Lineage tracking**: `parent_template_id` and `source_template_id` maintain the chain\n- **Depth tracking**: `inheritance_depth` (0=system, 1=company, 2=project) for quick filtering\n\n---\n\n## Type Order ↔ Work Order Binding\n\nThe `type_order_default_work_orders` junction table links type orders to their default work order templates:\n\n```\nKitchen (type_order)\n  ├── Painting - Standard (required)\n  ├── Plumbing - Kitchen (required)\n  ├── Electrical - Kitchen (required)\n  ├── Flooring - Standard (required)\n  └── Appliances - Kitchen (not required)\n```\n\nWhen a unit is assigned a type order (e.g., \"Kitchen\"), the system can auto-generate work orders from the default template set. The `is_required` flag controls whether a work order is mandatory or optional for that space type.\n\n---\n\n## BOM Action Requests (PDF → Work Orders)\n\nThe `bom_action_requests` table bridges **architectural documents to work orders**:\n\n```\nPDF Upload → doc-parser extracts BOM items\n    │\n    ├── \"Install 3 GFCI outlets in Kitchen\"  →  matched to Electrical template\n    ├── \"Replace sink and faucet\"            →  matched to Plumbing template\n    └── \"Paint all walls - 2 coats\"          →  matched to Painting template\n```\n\n| Field | Purpose |\n|-------|---------|\n| `match_method` | How the match was made: `pending`, `auto`, `manual`, `ai_suggested` |\n| `match_confidence` | 0.00–1.00 confidence score for auto/AI matches |\n| `status` | Lifecycle: `pending` → `matched` → `applied` (or `rejected`) |\n\nThis enables a workflow where architectural PDFs automatically suggest work order assignments at the unit level, with human review for low-confidence matches.\n\n---\n\n## Summary: What Each Level Controls\n\n| Dimension | System | Company | Project | Unit |\n|-----------|--------|---------|---------|------|\n| **Trades** | Define global trade taxonomy (10) | Add custom trades, select active trades | — | — |\n| **Outcomes** | Define project classifications (4) | Add custom outcomes, map trades to outcomes | Select outcome for project | — |\n| **Type Orders** | Define universal space types (22) | Add/customize space types, create composites | Add project-specific spaces | Assign type order to unit |\n| **Templates** | Best-practice templates per trade | Copy & customize, add org-specific templates | Copy & customize for project | Instance as work order, toggle tasks |\n| **Work Orders** | — | — | — | Concrete instances with status tracking |\n| **BOM Requests** | — | — | Upload PDFs, review matches | Apply matched templates as work orders |\n\n---\n\n## Design Principles\n\n1. **Copy-on-inherit, never auto-propagate**: Changes at any level are isolated. Downstream copies are independent snapshots.\n2. **Additive at every level**: Each scope can add net-new items without affecting other scopes.\n3. **Denormalized for speed**: Trade names synced via triggers. Scope and depth fields enable fast filtering without joins.\n4. **Composable workspaces**: Atomic spaces compose into unit types. Unit types compose into projects.\n5. **Document-driven automation**: BOM action requests bridge PDFs to structured work orders with confidence scoring.\nDOCEOF\n\nwc -l /a0/usr/projects/timesheet_app/voicelog-scaffold/docs/general/system_flexibility.md\necho 'Document created successfully.'"
    }
}

import type { Component } from 'solid-js';
import type { Session } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
import { Router, Route } from '@solidjs/router';
import { supabase } from './lib/supabase';
import Layout from './components/Layout';
import LoginPage from './pages/LoginPage';
import Dashboard from './pages/Dashboard';
import Units from './pages/Units';
import Templates from './pages/Templates';
import TemplateDetail from './pages/TemplateDetail';
import TemplateEditor from './pages/TemplateEditor';
import CompanyTemplates from './pages/CompanyTemplates';
import ProjectTemplates from './pages/ProjectTemplates';
import WorkOrderDetail from './pages/WorkOrderDetail';
import Projects from './pages/Projects';
import ProjectDetail from './pages/ProjectDetail';
import NewProject from './pages/NewProject';
import ProjectDocuments from './pages/ProjectDocuments';
import './index.css';

const App: Component = () => {
  const [session, setSession] = createSignal<Session | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = createSignal(true);

  onMount(async () => {
    const { data: { session: s } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
    setSession(s);
    setLoading(false);

    supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, s) => {
      setSession(s);
    });
  });

  const handleLogin = async () => {
    const { data: { session: s } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
    setSession(s);
  };

  const handleLogout = async () => {
    await supabase.auth.signOut();
    setSession(null);
  };

  return (
    <Show when={!loading()} fallback={
      <div class="flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen">
        <div class="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-primary-600" />
      </div>
    }>
      <Show when={session()} fallback={<LoginPage onLogin={handleLogin} />}>
        <Router root={(props) => (
          <Layout
            userEmail={session()!.user.email || ''}
            onLogout={handleLogout}
          >
            {props.children}
          </Layout>
        )}>
          <Route path="/" component={Dashboard} />
          <Route path="/units" component={Units} />
          <Route path="/templates" component={Templates} />
          <Route path="/templates/company" component={CompanyTemplates} />
          <Route path="/templates/new" component={TemplateEditor} />
          <Route path="/templates/:id/edit" component={TemplateEditor} />
          <Route path="/templates/:id" component={TemplateDetail} />
          <Route path="/work-orders/:id" component={WorkOrderDetail} />
          <Route path="/projects" component={Projects} />
          <Route path="/projects/new" component={NewProject} />
          <Route path="/projects/:id" component={ProjectDetail} />
          <Route path="/projects/:id/documents" component={ProjectDocuments} />
          <Route path="/projects/:projectId/templates" component={ProjectTemplates} />
        </Router>
      </Show>
    </Show>
  );
};

export default App;

import { supabase } from './supabase';

const API_URL = import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3000/work-orders';

export interface Unit {
  id: string;
  organization_id: string;
  project_id?: string;  // NEW: Link to WO Project
  unit_number: string;
  unit_type: string;
  floor: number;
  area_sf: number;
  bedrooms?: number;
  status: 'not_started' | 'in_progress' | 'completed';
  metadata?: Record<string, any>;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export interface WOProject {
  id: string;
  organization_id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string;
  project_type: string;
  library_id?: string;
  status: 'staged' | 'active' | 'paused' | 'completed' | 'archived';
  metadata?: Record<string, any>;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export interface TemplateLibrary {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description?: string;
  project_type: string;
  scope: 'app' | 'company';
  organization_id?: string;
  icon?: string;
  color?: string;
  is_active: boolean;
  is_default: boolean;
  metadata?: Record<string, any>;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export interface WorkOrderTemplate {
  id: string;
  scope: 'app' | 'company' | 'project';  // NEW: Template scope
  organization_id?: string;  // Now optional for app-level templates
  project_id?: string;  // NEW: For project-level templates
  library_id?: string;  // NEW: Template library association
  trade_name: string;
  version: number;
  is_active: boolean;
  is_frozen?: boolean;
  definition: {
    sections: Record<string, {
      label: string;
      order: number;
      columns: Array<{
        key: string;
        label: string;
        type: string;
        order: number;
      }>;
      items?: string[];
    }>;
  } | null;
  parent_template_id?: string;

  updated_at: string;

}

class ApiClient {
  private baseUrl: string;

  constructor(baseUrl: string) {
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl;
  }

  private async request<T>(endpoint: string, options?: RequestInit): Promise<T> {
    const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
    const response = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${endpoint}`, {
      ...options,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        ...(session?.access_token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${session.access_token}` } : {}),
        ...options?.headers,
      },
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const error = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`API Error: ${response.status} - ${error}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  }

  // Units
  async getUnits(): Promise<Unit[]> {
    return this.request<Unit[]>('/units');
  }

  async getUnit(id: string): Promise<Unit> {
    return this.request<Unit>(`/units/${id}`);
  }

  async updateUnit(id: string, data: Partial<Unit>): Promise<Unit> {
    return this.request<Unit>(`/units/${id}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  // Templates
  async getTemplates(scope?: 'app' | 'company' | 'project'): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate[]> {
    const query = scope ? `?scope=${scope}` : '';
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate[]>(`/templates${query}`);
  }

  async getTemplate(id: string): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate>(`/templates/${id}`);
  }

  async createTemplate(data: Partial<WorkOrderTemplate>): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate>('/templates', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async updateTemplate(id: string, data: Partial<WorkOrderTemplate>): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate>(`/templates/${id}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async deleteTemplate(id: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
    return this.request(`/templates/${id}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
  }

  // Template Inheritance / Assignment
  async getAppTemplates(): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate[]> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate[]>('/templates/app');
  }

  async getCompanyTemplates(): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate[]> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate[]>('/templates/company');
  }

  async getProjectTemplates(projectId: string): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate[]> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate[]>(`/templates/project/${projectId}`);
  }

  async assignTemplateToCompany(appTemplateId: string, organizationId: string): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate>('/templates/assign-to-company', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ app_template_id: appTemplateId, organization_id: organizationId }),
    });
  }

  async assignTemplateToProject(companyTemplateId: string, projectId: string, organizationId: string): Promise<WorkOrderTemplate> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTemplate>('/templates/assign-to-project', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ company_template_id: companyTemplateId, project_id: projectId, organization_id: organizationId }),
    });
  }

  async unassignTemplateFromProject(templateId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
    return this.request(`/templates/${templateId}/unassign`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
  }

  // Template Visibility Preferences
  async getHiddenTemplateIds(): Promise<string[]> {
    return this.request<string[]>('/templates/prefs/hidden');
  }

  async setTemplateHidden(templateId: string, isHidden: boolean): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
    return this.request(`/templates/prefs/${templateId}/hidden`, {
      method: 'PUT',
      body: JSON.stringify({ is_hidden: isHidden }),
    });
  }

  // Work Orders
  async getWorkOrders(): Promise<WorkOrder[]> {
    return this.request<WorkOrder[]>('/work-orders');
  }

  async getWorkOrder(id: string): Promise<WorkOrder> {
    return this.request<WorkOrder>(`/work-orders/${id}`);
  }

  async createWorkOrder(data: { unit_id: string; template_id: string }): Promise<WorkOrder> {
    return this.request<WorkOrder>('/work-orders', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async updateWorkOrder(id: string, data: Partial<WorkOrder>): Promise<WorkOrder> {
    return this.request<WorkOrder>(`/work-orders/${id}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  // Tasks
  async updateTask(workOrderId: string, taskId: string, data: Partial<WorkOrderTask>): Promise<WorkOrderTask> {
    return this.request<WorkOrderTask>(`/work-orders/${workOrderId}/tasks/${taskId}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  // Notes
  async getNotes(workOrderId: string): Promise<any[]> {
    return this.request<any[]>(`/work-orders/${workOrderId}/notes`);
  }

  async createNote(workOrderId: string, content: string): Promise<any> {
    return this.request<any>(`/work-orders/${workOrderId}/notes`, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ content }),
    });
  }

  // Projects
  async getProjects(): Promise<WOProject[]> {
    return this.request<WOProject[]>('/projects');
  }

  async getProject(id: string): Promise<WOProject> {
    return this.request<WOProject>(`/projects/${id}`);
  }

  async createProject(data: Partial<WOProject>): Promise<WOProject> {
    return this.request<WOProject>('/projects', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async updateProject(id: string, data: Partial<WOProject>): Promise<WOProject> {
    return this.request<WOProject>(`/projects/${id}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async deleteProject(id: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
    return this.request(`/projects/${id}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
  }

  // Template Libraries
  async getTemplateLibraries(params?: {
    project_type?: string;
    scope?: 'app' | 'company';
  }): Promise<TemplateLibrary[]> {
    const query = params ? new URLSearchParams(params as any).toString() : '';
    return this.request<TemplateLibrary[]>(
      `/template-libraries${query ? `?${query}` : ''}`
    );
  }

  async getTemplateLibrary(id: string): Promise<TemplateLibrary> {
    return this.request<TemplateLibrary>(`/template-libraries/${id}`);
  }

  async getDefaultLibrary(projectType: string): Promise<TemplateLibrary> {
    return this.request<TemplateLibrary>(
      `/template-libraries/default/${projectType}`
    );
  }

  // Documents
  async getProjectDocuments(projectId: string): Promise<ProjectDocument[]> {
    return this.request<ProjectDocument[]>(`/projects/${projectId}/documents`);
  }

  async uploadDocument(projectId: string, file: File, title?: string, description?: string): Promise<ProjectDocument> {
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('file', file);
    if (title) formData.append('title', title);
    if (description) formData.append('description', description);

    const response = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/projects/${projectId}/documents`, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: formData,
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const error = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`API Error: ${response.status} - ${error}`);
    }

    return response.json();
  }

  async getDocument(documentId: string): Promise<ProjectDocument> {
    return this.request<ProjectDocument>(`/documents/${documentId}`);
  }

  async updateDocument(documentId: string, data: Partial<ProjectDocument>): Promise<ProjectDocument> {
    return this.request<ProjectDocument>(`/documents/${documentId}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async deleteDocument(documentId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
    return this.request(`/documents/${documentId}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
  }

  async getDocumentDownloadUrl(documentId: string): Promise<{ url: string; filename: string; expires_at: string }> {
    return this.request(`/documents/${documentId}/download`);
  }

  // Image Extraction
  async extractImagesFromDocument(documentId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; images_extracted: number; images: DocumentImage[] }> {
    return this.request(`/documents/${documentId}/extract-images`, {
      method: 'POST',
    });
  }

  async getDocumentImages(documentId: string): Promise<DocumentImage[]> {
    return this.request<DocumentImage[]>(`/documents/${documentId}/images`);
  }

  async getImage(imageId: string): Promise<DocumentImage> {
    return this.request<DocumentImage>(`/images/${imageId}`);
  }

  async updateImage(imageId: string, data: Partial<DocumentImage>): Promise<DocumentImage> {
    return this.request<DocumentImage>(`/images/${imageId}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
    });
  }

  async deleteImage(imageId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean }> {
    return this.request(`/images/${imageId}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
  }

  // Text Extraction
  async extractTextFromDocument(documentId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; page_count: number; text: string; pages: string[] }> {
    return this.request(`/documents/${documentId}/extract-text`, {
      method: 'POST',
    });
  }

  // Claude AI Parsing
  async parseDocumentWithClaude(documentId: string, customPrompt?: string): Promise<ParsedDocumentResult> {
    return this.request(`/documents/${documentId}/parse`, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: customPrompt ? JSON.stringify({ customPrompt }) : undefined,
    });
  }

  async generateWorkOrdersFromDocument(documentId: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; work_orders_count: number; work_orders: any[] }> {
    return this.request(`/documents/${documentId}/generate-work-orders`, {
      method: 'POST',
    });
  }

  // ============================================================
  // Doc-Parser Integration (P1-P7)
  // ============================================================

  /** Submit a document for parsing via doc-parser service */
  async submitDocParserJob(
    documentId: string,
    engine: 'claude-direct' | 'hybrid' = 'hybrid'
  ): Promise<{ job_id: string; status: string; engine: string }> {
    return this.request(`/doc-parser/parse`, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ document_id: documentId, engine }),
    });
  }

  /** Poll job status (lightweight endpoint) */
  async getDocParserStatus(jobId: string): Promise<{
    job_id: string;
    status: 'queued' | 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'timeout';
    engine: string;
    file_name: string;
    progress: {
      current_phase: string;
      phases: string[];
      current_page: number;
      total_pages: number;
      current_step: string;
      floorplans_found: number;
      tables_found: number;
      percent_complete: number;
    };
    error?: string;
    created_at: string;
    updated_at: string;
  }> {
    return this.request(`/doc-parser/status/${jobId}`);
  }

  /** Fetch full results (heavy endpoint, call once after completed) */
  async getDocParserResults(jobId: string, summary?: boolean): Promise<any> {
    const query = summary ? '?summary=true' : '';
    return this.request(`/doc-parser/results/${jobId}${query}`);
  }

  /** List all doc-parser jobs */
  async listDocParserJobs(status?: string): Promise<any[]> {
    const query = status ? `?status=${status}` : '';
    return this.request(`/doc-parser/jobs${query}`);
  }

  /** Delete a doc-parser job */
  async deleteDocParserJob(jobId: string): Promise<{ status: string }> {
    return this.request(`/doc-parser/jobs/${jobId}`, {
      method: 'DELETE',
    });
  }

  /** Check doc-parser service health */
  async getDocParserHealth(): Promise<{
    status: string;
    version: string;
    engines: string[];
  }> {
    return this.request('/doc-parser/health');
  }

}

import type { Component } from 'solid-js';
import { createSignal, onMount } from 'solid-js';
import { useNavigate } from '@solidjs/router';
import ProjectFormModal from '../components/ProjectFormModal';

const NewProject: Component = () => {
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [showModal, setShowModal] = createSignal(false);

    onMount(() => {
        setShowModal(true);
    });

    const handleClose = () => {
        setShowModal(false);
        navigate('/projects');
    };

    return (
        <>
            {showModal() && (
                <ProjectFormModal
                    onClose={handleClose}
                    onSuccess={() => {
                        // Navigation handled in the modal
                    }}
                />
            )}
        </>
    );
};

import type { Component } from 'solid-js';
import { createResource, createSignal, For, Show } from 'solid-js';
import { A } from '@solidjs/router';
import type { WOProject } from '../lib/api';
import { api } from '../lib/api';

const Projects: Component = () => {
    const [projects] = createResource<WOProject[]>(() => api.getProjects());
    const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = createSignal<string>('all');
    const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = createSignal<string>('');

    const filteredProjects = () => {
        const allProjects = projects() || [];
        let filtered = allProjects;

        // Filter by status
        if (statusFilter() !== 'all') {
            filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.status === statusFilter());
        }

        // Filter by search query
        const query = searchQuery().toLowerCase();
        if (query) {
            filtered = filtered.filter(p =>
                p.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
                p.description?.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
                p.project_type.toLowerCase().includes(query)
            );
        }

        return filtered;
    };

    const getProjectTypeIcon = (type: string) => {
        const icons: Record<string, string> = {
            'residential_house': '🏠',
            'commercial_apartment': '🏢',
            'office_commercial': '🏢',
            'retail': '🏪',
            'mixed_use': '🏗️'
        };
        return icons[type] || '📋';
    };

    const getProjectTypeLabel = (type: string) => {
        const labels: Record<string, string> = {
            'residential_house': 'Residential House',
            'commercial_apartment': 'Commercial Apartment',
            'office_commercial': 'Office/Commercial',
            'retail': 'Retail',
            'mixed_use': 'Mixed-Use'
        };
        return labels[type] || type;
    };

    const getStatusBadgeClass = (status: string) => {
        const classes: Record<string, string> = {
            'active': 'badge-success',
            'completed': 'badge-primary',
            'archived': 'badge-secondary'
        };
        return `badge ${classes[status] || 'badge-secondary'}`;
    };

    const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {
        return status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1);
    };

    return (
        <div class="space-y-6">
            {/* Page Header */}
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Projects</h1>
                    <p class="mt-2 text-gray-600">
                        Manage work order projects and their configurations
                    </p>
                </div>
                <A href="/projects/new" class="btn btn-primary">
                    + New Project
                </A>
            </div>

            {/* Filters */}
            <div class="card">
                <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4">
                    {/* Status Filter */}
                    <div class="flex gap-2">
                        <button
                            class={`px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${statusFilter() === 'all'
                                    ? 'bg-primary-100 text-primary-700'
                                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                                }`}
                            onClick={() => setStatusFilter('all')}
                        >
                            All
                        </button>
                        <button
                            class={`px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${statusFilter() === 'active'
                                    ? 'bg-primary-100 text-primary-700'
                                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                                }`}
                            onClick={() => setStatusFilter('active')}
                        >
                            Active
                        </button>
                        <button
                            class={`px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${statusFilter() === 'completed'
                                    ? 'bg-primary-100 text-primary-700'
                                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                                }`}
                            onClick={() => setStatusFilter('completed')}
                        >
                            Completed
                        </button>
                        <button
                            class={`px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${statusFilter() === 'archived'
                                    ? 'bg-primary-100 text-primary-700'
                                    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                                }`}
                            onClick={() => setStatusFilter('archived')}
                        >
                            Archived
                        </button>
                    </div>

                    {/* Search */}
                    <div class="flex-1">
                        <div class="relative">
                            <input
                                type="text"
                                placeholder="Search projects..."
                                class="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-transparent"
                                value={searchQuery()}
                                onInput={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.currentTarget.value)}
                            />
                            <svg
                                class="absolute left-3 top-2.5 w-5 h-5 text-gray-400"
                                fill="none"
                                stroke="currentColor"
                                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                            >
                                <path
                                    stroke-linecap="round"
                                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                                    stroke-width="2"
                                    d="M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z"
                                />
                            </svg>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* Projects Grid */}
            <Show
                when={!projects.loading}
                fallback={
                    <div class="text-center py-12">
                        <p class="text-gray-500">Loading projects...</p>
                    </div>
                }
            >
                <Show
                    when={filteredProjects().length > 0}

                                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                                            <span class="text-3xl">
                                                {getProjectTypeIcon(project.project_type)}

                                                <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">
                                                    {project.name}
                                                </h3>
                                                <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">
                                                    {getProjectTypeLabel(project.project_type)}
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <span class={getStatusBadgeClass(project.status)}>
                                            {getStatusLabel(project.status)}
                                        </span>
                                    </div>

                                    <Show when={project.description}>
                                        <p class="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4 line-clamp-2">
                                            {project.description}
                                        </p>
                                    </Show>

                                    <div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200">
                                        <div class="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
                                            <span class="text-gray-500">
                                                Created {new Date(project.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                                            </span>
                                            <svg
                                                class="w-5 h-5 text-gray-400"
                                                fill="none"
                                                stroke="currentColor"
                                                viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                                            >
                                                <path
                                                    stroke-linecap="round"
                                                    stroke-linejoin="round"
                                                    stroke-width="2"
                                                    d="M9 5l7 7-7 7"
                                                />
                                            </svg>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </A>
                            )}
                        </For>
                    </div>
                </Show>
            </Show>

            {/* Summary Stats */}
            <Show when={projects()}>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    <div class="card bg-primary-50 border-primary-200">
                        <p class="text-sm font-medium text-primary-900">Total Projects</p>
                        <p class="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-primary-600">

                        </p>

                    <div class="card bg-green-50 border-green-200">
                        <p class="text-sm font-medium text-green-900">Active Projects</p>
                        <p class="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-green-600">
                            {projects()?.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length || 0}
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="card bg-blue-50 border-blue-200">
                        <p class="text-sm font-medium text-blue-900">Completed Projects</p>
                        <p class="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-blue-600">
                            {projects()?.filter(p => p.status === 'completed').length || 0}

            </Show>
        </div>
    );
};

const ProjectDetail: Component = () => {
    const params = useParams();
    const navigate = useNavigate();
    const [project] = createResource<WOProject>(() => {
        if (!params.id) {
            navigate('/projects');
            throw new Error('No project ID provided');
        }
        return api.getProject(params.id);
    });

    const getProjectTypeIcon = (type: string) => {
        const icons: Record<string, string> = {
            'residential_house': '🏠',
            'commercial_apartment': '🏢',
            'office_commercial': '🏢',
            'retail': '🏪',
            'mixed_use': '🏗️'
        };
        return icons[type] || '📋';
    };

    const getProjectTypeLabel = (type: string) => {
        const labels: Record<string, string> = {
            'residential_house': 'Residential House',
            'commercial_apartment': 'Commercial Apartment',
            'office_commercial': 'Office/Commercial',
            'retail': 'Retail',
            'mixed_use': 'Mixed-Use'
        };
        return labels[type] || type;
    };

        const classes: Record<string, string> = {
            'active': 'badge-success',

        };
        return `badge ${classes[status] || 'badge-secondary'}`;

    const getStatusLabel = (status: string) => {
        return status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + status.slice(1);
    };

    const handleDelete = async () => {
        if (!params.id) return;

        }

            >

                                    <div>

                                        <p class="text-lg text-gray-600 mt-1">
                                            {getProjectTypeLabel(proj().project_type)}
                                        </p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">

import type { Component } from 'solid-js';
import { createResource, createSignal, For, Show } from 'solid-js';
import { A } from '@solidjs/router';
import type { WorkOrderTemplate, WOProject } from '../lib/api';
import { api } from '../lib/api';

const DEFAULT_ORG_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001';

const Templates: Component = () => {
    // Core data
    const [companyTemplates, { refetch: refetchCompany }] = createResource<WorkOrderTemplate[]>(
        () => api.getCompanyTemplates()
    );
    const [projects] = createResource<WOProject[]>(() => api.getProjects());

    const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = createSignal<'company' | 'project'>('company');
    const [selectedProjectId, setSelectedProjectId] = createSignal('');
    const [toggling, setToggling] = createSignal('');
    const [bulkWorking, setBulkWorking] = createSignal(false);
    const [error, setError] = createSignal('');

    // Project templates — only fetched when a project is selected
    const [projectTemplates, { refetch: refetchProject }] = createResource(
        () => activeTab() === 'project' && selectedProjectId() ? selectedProjectId() : null,
        (id) => api.getProjectTemplates(id)
    );

    // Collapsible cards
    const [collapsedCards, setCollapsedCards] = createSignal<Set<string>>(new Set<string>());
    const isExpanded = (id: string) => !collapsedCards().has(id);
    const toggleCard = (id: string) => {
        setCollapsedCards(prev => {
            const next = new Set(prev);
            if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id);
            else next.add(id);
            return next;
        });
    };
    const openAll = (templates: WorkOrderTemplate[]) => {
        setCollapsedCards(prev => {
            const next = new Set(prev);
            templates.forEach(t => next.delete(t.id));
            return next;
        });
    };
    const closeAll = (templates: WorkOrderTemplate[]) => {
        setCollapsedCards(prev => {
            const next = new Set(prev);
            templates.forEach(t => next.add(t.id));
            return next;
        });
    };

    // ── Project Tab Logic ──────────────────────────
    const projectAssigned = () => projectTemplates() || [];
    const projectUnassigned = () => {
        const company = companyTemplates() || [];
        const assigned = new Set((projectTemplates() || []).map(t => t.trade_name));
        return company.filter(t => !assigned.has(t.trade_name));
    };

    const handleAssignToProject = async (companyTemplate: WorkOrderTemplate) => {
        setToggling(companyTemplate.id);
        setError('');
        try {
            await api.assignTemplateToProject(companyTemplate.id, selectedProjectId(), DEFAULT_ORG_ID);
            refetchProject();
        } catch (err: any) {
            setError(err.message || 'Failed to assign template');
        } finally {
            setToggling('');
        }
    };

    const handleUnassignFromProject = async (template: WorkOrderTemplate) => {
        setToggling(template.id);
        setError('');
        try {
            await api.unassignTemplateFromProject(template.id);
            refetchProject();
        } catch (err: any) {
            setError(err.message || 'Failed to remove template');
        } finally {
            setToggling('');
        }
    };

    const handleAssignAll = async () => {
        setBulkWorking(true);
        setError('');
        try {
            for (const t of projectUnassigned()) {
                await api.assignTemplateToProject(t.id, selectedProjectId(), DEFAULT_ORG_ID);
            }
            refetchProject();
        } catch (err: any) {
            setError(err.message || 'Failed to assign all templates');
        } finally {
            setBulkWorking(false);
        }
    };

    const handleUnassignAll = async () => {
        setBulkWorking(true);
        setError('');
        try {
            for (const t of projectAssigned()) {
                await api.unassignTemplateFromProject(t.id);
            }
            refetchProject();
        } catch (err: any) {
            setError(err.message || 'Failed to unassign all templates');
        } finally {
            setBulkWorking(false);
        }
    };

    // ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────
    const getSectionCount = (t: WorkOrderTemplate) =>
        Object.keys(t.definition?.sections || {}).length;

    const getColumnCount = (t: WorkOrderTemplate) => {
        const sections = t.definition?.sections || {};
        return Object.values(sections).reduce((total, section) =>
            total + (section.columns?.length || 0), 0);
    };

    // Context-aware "Create" URL
    const createUrl = () => {
        if (activeTab() === 'project' && selectedProjectId()) {
            const project = (projects() || []).find(p => p.id === selectedProjectId());
            const name = encodeURIComponent(project?.name || '');
            return `/templates/new?scope=project&project_id=${selectedProjectId()}&project_name=${name}`;
        }
        return '/templates/new?scope=company';
    };

    // ── Open All / Close All control strip ──────────
    const CollapsControls = (props: { templates: WorkOrderTemplate[] }) => (
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span class="text-sm text-gray-500">{props.templates.length} template{props.templates.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <button
                    class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                    onClick={() => openAll(props.templates)}
                >
                    Open All
                </button>
                <button
                    class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                    onClick={() => closeAll(props.templates)}
                >
                    Close All
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    );

    // ── Template Card ──────────────────────────────
    const TemplateCard = (props: {
        template: WorkOrderTemplate;
        onToggle?: () => void;
        toggleLabel?: string;
        toggleColor?: 'green' | 'red';
        borderClass: string;
    }) => {
        const t = props.template;
        return (
            <div class={`card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border-l-4 ${props.borderClass}`}>
                <div class="flex items-start justify-between">
                    <div
                        class="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 cursor-pointer select-none"
                        onClick={() => toggleCard(t.id)}
                    >
                        <svg
                            class={`w-4 h-4 text-gray-400 transition-transform flex-shrink-0 ${isExpanded(t.id) ? 'rotate-90' : ''}`}
                            fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"
                        >
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" />
                        </svg>
                        <div>
                            <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">{t.trade_name}</h3>
                            <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-0.5">
                                v{t.version} · {getSectionCount(t)} work orders · {getColumnCount(t)} tasks
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <Show when={props.onToggle}>
                        <button
                            class={`ml-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md border transition-colors flex-shrink-0 ${
                                props.toggleColor === 'green'
                                    ? 'text-green-700 bg-green-50 hover:bg-green-100 border-green-200'
                                    : 'text-red-600 bg-red-50 hover:bg-red-100 border-red-200'
                            }`}
                            onClick={props.onToggle}
                            disabled={toggling() === t.id || bulkWorking()}
                        >
                            {toggling() === t.id ? '…' : props.toggleLabel}
                        </button>
                    </Show>
                </div>

                {/* Collapsible body */}
                <Show when={isExpanded(t.id)}>
                    <div class="mt-4 space-y-3">
                        <div class="pt-3 border-t border-gray-200">
                            <p class="text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase mb-2">Work Orders</p>
                            <div class="space-y-1">
                                <For each={Object.entries(t.definition?.sections || {}).slice(0, 4)}>
                                    {([_, section]) => (
                                        <div class="text-sm text-gray-700">• {section.label}</div>
                                    )}
                                </For>
                                <Show when={getSectionCount(t) > 4}>
                                    <div class="text-sm text-gray-400">+ {getSectionCount(t) - 4} more…</div>
                                </Show>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="pt-3 border-t border-gray-200 flex gap-2">
                            <A href={`/templates/${t.id}`} class="btn btn-secondary flex-1 text-center text-sm">View</A>
                            <A href={`/templates/${t.id}/edit`} class="btn btn-primary flex-1 text-center text-sm">Edit</A>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </Show>
            </div>
        );
    };

    return (
        <div class="space-y-6">
            {/* Page Header */}
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
                <div>
                    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Trade WO Templates</h1>
                    <p class="mt-2 text-gray-600">
                        Manage templates for different trades and workflows
                    </p>
                </div>
                <A href={createUrl()} class="btn btn-primary">
                    <span class="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4" />
                        </svg>
                        Create WO Template
                    </span>
                </A>
            </div>

            {/* Tabs */}
            <div class="flex gap-2">
                <button
                    class={`px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                        activeTab() === 'company'
                            ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
                            : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => { setActiveTab('company'); setSelectedProjectId(''); setError(''); }}
                >
                    Company Templates
                </button>
                <button
                    class={`px-4 py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                        activeTab() === 'project'
                            ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
                            : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => { setActiveTab('project'); setSelectedProjectId(''); setError(''); }}
                >
                    Project Templates
                </button>
            </div>

            {/* Error */}
            <Show when={error()}>
                <div class="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-between">
                    <span>{error()}</span>
                    <button class="text-red-500 underline text-sm ml-4" onClick={() => setError('')}>dismiss</button>
                </div>
            </Show>

            {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════
                COMPANY TEMPLATES TAB
               ═══════════════════════════════════════ */}
            <Show when={activeTab() === 'company'}>
                {/* Blue context banner */}
                <div class="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-2.5">
                    <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-blue-500 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-800">Company Scope</span>
                    <span class="text-sm text-blue-600">— available across all projects in this organization</span>
                </div>

                <Show when={!companyTemplates.loading} fallback={
                    <div class="text-center py-12"><p class="text-gray-500">Loading templates…</p></div>
                }>
                    <Show when={(companyTemplates() || []).length > 0} fallback={
                        <div class="card text-center py-12">
                            <svg class="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                                <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 12h6m-6 4h6m2 5H7a2 2 0 01-2-2V5a2 2 0 012-2h5.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l5.414 5.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V19a2 2 0 01-2 2z" />
                            </svg>
                            <p class="text-gray-500 mb-2">No company templates assigned yet.</p>
                            <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">
                                Use the <a href="http://localhost:3005/#/admin" class="text-blue-600 underline">Tenant Portal Admin</a> to assign templates to this company.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    }>
                        <CollapsControls templates={companyTemplates()!} />
                        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                            <For each={companyTemplates()!}>
                                {(template) => (
                                    <TemplateCard template={template} borderClass="border-l-blue-500" />
                                )}
                            </For>
                        </div>
                    </Show>
                </Show>
            </Show>

            {/* ═══════════════════════════════════════
                 PROJECT TEMPLATES TAB
               ═══════════════════════════════════════ */}
            <Show when={activeTab() === 'project'}>
                {/* Purple context banner */}
                <div class="bg-purple-50 border border-purple-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-2.5">
                    <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-purple-500 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-purple-800">Project Scope</span>
                    <span class="text-sm text-purple-600">— assign company templates to a specific project</span>
                </div>

                {/* Project Selector */}
                <div class="card">
                    <label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Select a project</label>
                    <select
                        class="input max-w-md"
                        value={selectedProjectId()}
                        onChange={(e) => setSelectedProjectId(e.currentTarget.value)}
                    >
                        <option value="">— Select a project —</option>
                        <For each={projects()}>
                            {(p) => <option value={p.id}>{p.name} ({p.status})</option>}
                        </For>
                    </select>
                </div>

                <Show when={!selectedProjectId()}>
                    <div class="card text-center py-12">
                        <svg class="w-12 h-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M19 11H5m14 0a2 2 0 012 2v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2v-6a2 2 0 012-2m14 0V9a2 2 0 00-2-2M5 11V9a2 2 0 012-2m0 0V5a2 2 0 012-2h6a2 2 0 012 2v2M7 7h10" />
                        </svg>
                        <p class="text-gray-500">Select a project above to manage its templates.</p>
                    </div>
                </Show>

                <Show when={selectedProjectId()}>
                    <Show when={!projectTemplates.loading && !companyTemplates.loading} fallback={
                        <div class="text-center py-12"><p class="text-gray-500">Loading templates…</p></div>
                    }>
                        {/* ── Assigned Section ── */}
                        <div class="space-y-3">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-green-500 flex-shrink-0" />
                                    <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold text-green-700">Assigned</h2>
                                    <span class="text-sm text-gray-500">({projectAssigned().length})</span>
                                </div>
                                <Show when={projectAssigned().length > 0}>
                                    <div class="flex gap-2">
                                        <button
                                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                                            onClick={() => openAll(projectAssigned())}
                                        >
                                            Open All
                                        </button>
                                        <button
                                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                                            onClick={() => closeAll(projectAssigned())}
                                        >
                                            Close All
                                        </button>
                                        <button
                                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-red-300 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors disabled:opacity-40"
                                            onClick={handleUnassignAll}
                                            disabled={bulkWorking()}
                                        >
                                            {bulkWorking() ? '…' : 'Unassign All'}
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </Show>
                            </div>

                            <Show when={projectAssigned().length > 0} fallback={
                                <div class="card border-dashed border-2 border-gray-300 text-center py-8">
                                    <p class="text-gray-500">No templates assigned to this project yet. Add from the list below.</p>
                                </div>
                            }>
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                                    <For each={projectAssigned()}>
                                        {(template) => (
                                            <TemplateCard
                                                template={template}
                                                onToggle={() => handleUnassignFromProject(template)}
                                                toggleLabel="Unassign"
                                                toggleColor="red"
                                                borderClass="border-l-green-500"
                                            />
                                        )}
                                    </For>
                                </div>
                            </Show>
                        </div>

                        {/* ── Unassigned Section ── */}
                        <div class="space-y-3 mt-8">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                                    <div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
                                    <h2 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-500">Unassigned</h2>
                                    <span class="text-sm text-gray-400">({projectUnassigned().length})</span>
                                </div>
                                <Show when={projectUnassigned().length > 0}>
                                    <div class="flex gap-2">
                                        <button
                                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                                            onClick={() => openAll(projectUnassigned())}
                                        >
                                            Open All
                                        </button>
                                        <button
                                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                                            onClick={() => closeAll(projectUnassigned())}
                                        >
                                            Close All
                                        </button>
                                        <button
                                            class="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded border border-green-300 text-green-700 hover:bg-green-50 transition-colors disabled:opacity-40"
                                            onClick={handleAssignAll}
                                            disabled={bulkWorking()}
                                        >
                                            {bulkWorking() ? '…' : 'Assign All'}
                                        </button>
                                    </div>
                                </Show>
                            </div>

                            <Show when={projectUnassigned().length > 0} fallback={
                                <div class="card border-dashed border-2 border-green-200 bg-green-50 text-center py-8">
                                    <p class="text-green-700 font-medium">All company templates are assigned to this project.</p>
                                </div>
                            }>
                                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 opacity-70">
                                    <For each={projectUnassigned()}>
                                        {(template) => (
                                            <TemplateCard
                                                template={template}
                                                onToggle={() => handleAssignToProject(template)}
                                                toggleLabel="Assign"
                                                toggleColor="green"
                                                borderClass="border-l-gray-300"
                                            />
                                        )}
                                    </For>
                                </div>
                            </Show>
                        </div>
                    </Show>
                </Show>
            </Show>

            {/* Summary Stats */}
            <Show when={companyTemplates()}>
                <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                    <div class="card bg-blue-50 border-blue-200">
                        <p class="text-sm font-medium text-blue-900">Company Templates</p>
                        <p class="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-blue-600">
                            {(companyTemplates() || []).length}
                        </p>
                    </div>
                    <Show when={activeTab() === 'project' && selectedProjectId() && projectTemplates()}>
                        <div class="card bg-green-50 border-green-200">
                            <p class="text-sm font-medium text-green-900">Assigned to Project</p>
                            <p class="mt-1 text-3xl font-bold text-green-600">
                                {projectAssigned().length}
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </Show>
                </div>
            </Show>
        </div>
    );
};

import type { Component } from 'solid-js';
import { createSignal, createResource, For, Show } from 'solid-js';
import { A } from '@solidjs/router';
import type { WorkOrderTemplate } from '../lib/api';
import { api } from '../lib/api';

const DEFAULT_ORG_ID = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001';

const CompanyTemplates: Component = () => {
    const [companyTemplates, { refetch }] = createResource<WorkOrderTemplate[]>(() => api.getCompanyTemplates());
    const [appTemplates] = createResource<WorkOrderTemplate[]>(() => api.getAppTemplates());
    const [showPicker, setShowPicker] = createSignal(false);
    const [assigning, setAssigning] = createSignal('');
    const [error, setError] = createSignal('');

    // Filter app templates that haven't been assigned yet
    const unassignedAppTemplates = () => {
        const company = companyTemplates() || [];
        const app = appTemplates() || [];
        const assignedTradeNames = new Set(company.map(t => t.trade_name));
        return app.filter(t => !assignedTradeNames.has(t.trade_name));
    };

    const handleAssign = async (appTemplate: WorkOrderTemplate) => {
        setAssigning(appTemplate.id);
        setError('');
        try {
            await api.assignTemplateToCompany(appTemplate.id, DEFAULT_ORG_ID);
            setShowPicker(false);
            refetch();
        } catch (err: any) {
            setError(err.message || 'Failed to assign template');
        } finally {
            setAssigning('');
        }
    };

    const sectionCount = (t: WorkOrderTemplate) =>
        t.definition ? Object.keys(t.definition.sections).length : 0;

    const checklistCount = (t: WorkOrderTemplate) => {
        if (!t.definition) return 0;
        return Object.values(t.definition.sections).reduce(
            (sum, sec) => sum + (sec.columns?.length || 0), 0
        );
    };

    return (
        <div class="space-y-6">
            {/* Header */}
            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <A href="/templates" class="text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700">
                        <svg class="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" />
                        </svg>
                    </A>
                    <div>
                        <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Company Templates</h1>
                        <p class="mt-1 text-gray-600">
                            Manage which trade templates are available for your company's projects
                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="flex gap-2">
                    <button
                        class="btn btn-primary"
                        onClick={() => setShowPicker(true)}
                    >
                        <span class="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                                <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 4v16m8-8H4" />
                            </svg>
                            Add from App Templates
                        </span>
                    </button>
                    <A href="/templates/new" class="btn btn-secondary">
                        Create New
                    </A>
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* Error */}
            <Show when={error()}>
                <div class="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg">
                    {error()}
                </div>
            </Show>

            {/* App Template Picker Modal */}
            <Show when={showPicker()}>
                <div class="fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
                    <div class="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col">
                        <div class="p-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900">Add App Template</h2>
                                <button
                                    class="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                                    onClick={() => setShowPicker(false)}
                                >
                                    <svg class="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                                        <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" />
                                    </svg>
                                </button>
                            </div>
                            <p class="mt-1 text-sm text-gray-500">
                                Select an app template to copy into your company's template set
                            </p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="p-6 overflow-y-auto flex-1">
                            <Show
                                when={unassignedAppTemplates().length > 0}
                                fallback={
                                    <div class="text-center py-8">
                                        <p class="text-gray-500">All app templates have been assigned!</p>
                                    </div>
                                }
                            >
                                <div class="space-y-3">
                                    <For each={unassignedAppTemplates()}>
                                        {(template) => (
                                            <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 hover:border-primary-300 transition-colors">
                                                <div>
                                                    <h3 class="font-medium text-gray-900">{template.trade_name}</h3>
                                                    <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">
                                                        {sectionCount(template)} sections · {checklistCount(template)} checklist items
                                                    </p>
                                                </div>
                                                <button
                                                    class="btn btn-primary text-sm"
                                                    onClick={() => handleAssign(template)}
                                                    disabled={assigning() === template.id}
                                                >
                                                    {assigning() === template.id ? 'Adding...' : 'Add'}
                                                </button>
                                            </div>
                                        )}
                                    </For>
                                </div>
                            </Show>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </Show>

            {/* Company Templates Grid */}
            <Show
                when={!companyTemplates.loading}
                fallback={
                    <div class="text-center py-12">
                        <p class="text-gray-500">Loading templates...</p>
                    </div>
                }
            >
                <Show
                    when={(companyTemplates() || []).length > 0}
                    fallback={
                        <div class="card text-center py-12">
                            <p class="text-gray-500 mb-4">No company templates yet.</p>
                            <button class="btn btn-primary" onClick={() => setShowPicker(true)}>
                                Add from App Templates
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    }
                >
                    <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
                        <For each={companyTemplates()}>
                            {(template) => (
                                <div class="card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
                                    <div class="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                                        <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900">
                                            {template.trade_name}
                                        </h3>
                                        <Show when={template.copied_from_template_id}>
                                            <span class="badge badge-blue text-xs">From App</span>
                                        </Show>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="space-y-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                                        <p>{sectionCount(template)} sections</p>
                                        <p>{checklistCount(template)} checklist items</p>
